title: Sonic Checkpoints - S2 Star Post
description: My Sonic Checkpoints pack, but instead of an Lamp Post (from Sonic 1), it's an Star Post (from Sonic 2)
body:
I had stopped making resource packs, but I forgot I would make an version of Sonic Checkpoints where Lamp Posts would be Star Posts. Like Sonic Checkpoints' S1 Lamp Posts, the Respawn Anchor is made into an pedestal, where the Star Posts sits on top.
Recommended with RedPierre's [Genesis Flowers](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/genesis-flowers/).


_Looking for the Lamp Posts from Sonic 1? [Click here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sonic-checkpoints)._
